title: Embed a Monday Doc into a Monday Dashboard

posts.author: bdickinson (Brice Dickinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Looking to be able to add a workdoc column to a board and then in a dashboard view, add that column to a widget to view that workdoc.

What are you trying to achieve

Business case - Using a dashboard as a customer facing dashboard. Would like the ability to have a viewable monday work doc that has customer specific information from meetings, to-dos, etc. embedded into their dashboard for single pane of glass view.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 this would be really useful.

Using dashboards as a customer-facing “single pane of glass” is a great use case, and not being able to surface WorkDocs there is a big gap.

Right now you can link out or reference docs, but not actually embed them in a meaningful way alongside metrics and widgets. Having that context directly in the dashboard would make it much more complete and usable.

This would be especially valuable for:

  • client status dashboards

  • meeting notes and recaps

  • action items tied to reporting

Feels like a natural extension of dashboards and WorkDocs working together.
